name: Level Resist Wall
name_jp: レベル・レジストウォール
desc: If a monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: Target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon monster(s) from your Deck in Defense Position so their combined Levels equal the Level of that monster, but negate their effects. You can only activate 1 "Level Resist Wall" per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: Target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon monster(s) from your Deck in Defense Position so their combined Levels equal the Level of that monster, but negate their effects. You can only activate 1 "Level Resist Wall" per turn.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Obelisk the Tormentor

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
